title: Capture JT Voice OS Question 3 creator reference boundary

title: Capture JT Voice OS Question 4 sentence shapes

Patched jt_voice_guard to flag over-polished non-JT phrasing.

title: Capture JT Voice OS Question 6 content balance
description: Stored JT's content-balance directive: generated content should mix operator build proof, unique implementation details, and consultant POV on focused niche buyer problems, with content-generation guidance for Build Proof, Buyer Problem POV, and Bridge lanes.
